questions.text: looked at your ex's stories through a secondary account because they had blocked you
searched for your ex's new partner on social media the day of the breakup
googled someone before a first date to find out more about them
read a friend's messages left visible on their phone
checked who had seen someone's story to know if they were online
stalked your crush's ex on Insta at 3am
secretly checked your partner's followers to see if they had followed new accounts
analyzed someone's WhatsApp last seen to know what they were really doing
used a friend's profile to stalk someone who had blocked you
searched for someone on LinkedIn, Facebook AND Insta in the same evening
scrolled back to 2018 on someone's Insta the same day you met them
made a scene with your partner over a like on a stranger's photo
demanded to know where your partner was at every moment of the day
chosen or imposed someone's outfit for a party
asked for your partner's phone password by calling it a matter of trust
created a fake profile on social media to spy on someone
pretended to be passing by someone's neighborhood to check they were where they said
installed a geolocation app on your partner's phone without telling them
read someone's diary or private messages without their permission
shared private information about someone to hurt them after a breakup
hacked someone's account
broke into someone's home to check your suspicions
said 'whatever you want' while clearly thinking the exact opposite
ended a relationship by text or through a friend
pretended to be busy while posting on social media
pretended to be sick or busy to cancel plans you didn't want to do
lied about the exact number of your exes
pretended to forget a promise to avoid keeping it
intentionally ignored messages for hours to create a sense of longing
used a secret someone confided in you to hurt them during an argument
invented a friend or romantic interest to make your partner jealous
promised to change to keep someone, then changed absolutely nothing
said 'I'm fine' in a tone that clearly meant the opposite
exaggerated a story or discomfort to attract sympathy
promised to change just to keep someone around, then did nothing
played the victim to dodge accountability
cried strategically to win an argument or get what you wanted
made someone feel guilty for spending time with their friends instead of you
brought up past events during an argument solely to hurt
rewrote the facts of an argument in your favor when telling your friends
made someone believe they were 'too sensitive' to avoid taking responsibility for your actions
lied about where you were to avoid a conflict rather than face it
used silence to punish someone after a fight
made someone question their own memory during an argument
used the threat of a breakup as a control tool during an argument
convinced someone that their friends meant them harm to gradually isolate them
made someone believe they misremembered an event that had actually happened
used guilt to keep someone close to you
turned a lie into truth by repeating it enough times
steered the conversation back to yourself within 30 seconds of someone telling you their problems
retouched a profile photo for more than 20 minutes before posting it
checked your number of likes every 5 minutes after posting
genuinely believed you were the best-dressed person at a party
taken a selfie even when you felt awful
lied about an achievement to impress someone
genuinely thought your ex would never find anyone better than you
changed your profile photo right after a breakup to show your ex what they'd be missing
posted a story knowing exactly that a specific person would see it
intentionally replied late so as not to seem too available
made someone wait on purpose to seem busier and more desirable
changed details in a story to come across as cooler
left a date thinking that person clearly didn't deserve you
posted a cryptic story like 'some people should really keep quiet…'
spent more time planning an outing for the photos than to actually enjoy it
cancelled plans because you didn't feel physically good enough that day
deleted a post that got too few likes to protect your image
refused to admit a mistake because it would hurt your image
demanded photos of yourself as proof of love
believed you deserved special treatment just because you're you
thought your ex had left you out of jealousy of your success or potential
believed you deserved special treatment in a relationship just because you were too good
asked your friends to rate your exes to confirm you had more to offer
sent an angry message knowing your reaction was exaggerated
said 'nothing' in a tone that clearly meant the opposite and waited for the other person to insist
sulked for more than a day over something objectively minor
reacted wildly to a tiny annoyance just to get attention
yelled at someone when they hadn't really done anything
openly flirted with someone at a party solely to make your partner jealous
kept backup plans 'just in case' while being in a relationship
gone from 'I love you' to 'it's over between us' in the same evening
posted then deleted an aggressive message right after sending it
sent a voice message over 3 minutes long full of grievances
made a scene in a public place because you weren't happy
used days of silence as punishment after an argument
called or texted someone repeatedly after an argument until you got a response
threatened to do something serious solely to attract attention to yourself
told an intentionally distorted version of an argument to all your friends
ended a friendship very dramatically then tried to reconnect as if nothing had happened
started an argument to test whether the other person really loved you
threatened to hurt yourself or leave to manipulate someone
blocked and unblocked someone repeatedly just to mess with them
broke or threw an object during an argument to show how angry you were
contacted someone's family or employer during an argument
organized a public humiliation of your partner to get revenge for infidelity
threatened to reveal secrets to force someone to do what you wanted
intentionally started a fight between two people for the drama
texted someone 5 times in the same hour without receiving a reply
reread old conversations to reassure yourself about a relationship
anticipated a breakup that had no objective reason to happen
checked if someone was online while they weren't replying to your messages
thought someone stopped loving you because they didn't reply fast enough
felt the need to constantly check where your relationship stood
sent 10 consecutive messages without any reply
immediately asked for confirmation that someone still loved you right after an argument
analyzed every word of a received message looking for a negative meaning
been jealous of your partner's friends to the point of mentioning it
'coincidentally' planned to run into someone because they weren't responding
looked for warning signs of a breakup in every message you received
needed reassurance dozens of times a day
sent a follow-up after 5 minutes of silence
said 'I love you' to someone before the end of the first month
called someone's friends or family because they weren't responding to your messages
followed someone on all their social media the same day you met them
cancelled plans with your friends as soon as your partner was free
asked to be someone's only priority outside of work and family
showed up at someone's place unannounced because they had stopped responding
created fake accounts to join someone's groups
needed someone to text you constantly
planned the names of your future children together before the end of the first month
made someone responsible for your mental health and daily happiness
refused to accept a breakup and kept contacting the person for several weeks

rules.title:
Are you a
Red Flag?
rules.tagline: Your exes would have loved to give you this test
rules.levelHelper: Questions up to the selected level

steps.title: Read the question
steps.desc: Have you ever done that? Be honest.

steps.title: ↓ MEGA ×2
steps.desc: Question fits the player WAY too much? Swipe down: double penalty, giant red flag 🚩

steps.title: Results
steps.desc: Your score reveals your level of romantic toxicity.

verdicts.title: Absolute Green Flag
verdicts.quote: You're so healthy it's suspicious. We're watching you.

verdicts.title: Almost dateable
verdicts.quote: You've got red flags but nothing therapy can't fix.

verdicts.title: Assumed grey zone
verdicts.quote: Your exes probably have a WhatsApp group about you.

verdicts.title: Sentimental disaster
verdicts.quote: You destroy relationships without even realizing it. Respect.

verdicts.title: Public menace
verdicts.quote: Your exes should be able to deduct therapy from their taxes.

verdicts.title: Nuclear Red Flag
verdicts.quote: The army should ban you from downloading Tinder.

results.title: 🚩 Results
results.subtitle: Who flies the most red flags?

categoryFlair.narcisse: 🪞 The mirror is your best friend.
categoryFlair.collant: 🧷 Let them breathe for two minutes!
